item.title: Set Up Windows for C development
item.description: First year in college, got your first assignment in C, all your teachers use Linux and you don’t know what to do? Then you should keep on reading!

item.title: About Me
item.description: Well, hello there! My name is is Lautaro Emanuel and I’m a software engineering student at San Luis National University in San Luis, Argentina. You can contact me by sending an email to emlautarom1@gmail.com. I’m also on Twitter and if you’re interested in my projects you can check my GitHub account. Some projects I’ve worked on: Proyecto Paraísos: Mobile/Web PWA for tracking sick trees in my hometown, aggregate collected data and present it in a readable format to the community.
